name: Zinfandeli's Tortilla Soup - S.a. Express - Arlene Lightsey
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken breasts until done, then dice.
2. In a large Dutch oven, heat vegetable oil. Add garlic and corn tortillas. Saute until tender.
3. Add onion puree, tomato paste, cayenne pepper, cumin, bay leaves, tomato paste, chicken base, and water. Simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Remove bay leaves. Stir in chopped cilantro and epazote.
5. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve soup in individual bowls, garnished with diced chicken, avocado, fried tortilla strips, and cheese.
